menu_options.try_demo: Try demo sign (no UTMC account needed)
menu_options.try_demo_wind: Try wind warning demo (no UTMC account needed)

sign.title: VMS sign code
sign.description: Enter the sign code for the sign you want to monitor (for example VMS_NC_A1058_WB_B1307 or HE_A1_9570B). Enter Demo for a sample text sign, or demo-wind for the side-winds pictogram. See the supported signs table in the README ({sign_list_url}) — {sign_count} signs are currently supported.

reconfigure.title: Update UTMC credentials
reconfigure.description: Update your netraveldata.co.uk login. This applies to all Northeast Traffic Messages devices.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the UTMC API
error.unsupported_sign: That sign code is not on the supported list. Check the GitHub sign list and try again.
error.sign_not_found: The sign code was not found in the UTMC feed for your account
